channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Rare light aircraft crash in Beijing kills pilot, injures 13 people
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Pilot killed in Beijing skyscraper plane crash
- Pilot Dead, 13 People Injured After Plane Crashes Into Beijing’s Tallest Building
- Authorities acknowledge Beijing plane crash; pilot dead, 13 hurt
- Small plane crashed into Beijing high-rise, killing pilot and injuring 13
- A small plane has crashed into a Beijing high-rise, killing the pilot and injuring 13
- Pilot killed, 13 injured in plane crash into Beijing high-rise
- Small plane crash at Beijing high-rise kills the pilot and injures 13, authorities say
- Pilot killed, 13 injured after small plane crashes into Beijing high-rise
- Small plane crash at Beijing high-rise kills pilot and injures 13, authorities say
- Pilot killed when small plane crashed into Beijing skyscraper
- Pilot killed when small plane crashed into Beijing skyscraper: Authorities
- Small plane crash at Beijing high-rise kills the pilot and injures 13, authorities say]]>

item.title: Death toll in Venezuela quake tops 1,400 as rescue efforts intensify
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Venezuela earthquake toll hits 1,430, close to 69,000 people still missing, tension rises over 'inadequate response' by government as rescue teams running out of time to save lives, claim reports
- Venezuela earthquake death toll climbs amid anger over slow response
- Desperation Mounts In Venezuela As Earthquake Death Toll Rises To 1,430
- Venezuela quake death toll rises to 1,430 as rescue window narrows
- Venezuela Earthquake Death Toll Rises Above 1,400 as Rescue Efforts Continue
- Venezuela quakes kill almost 1,500, with millions more in need
- Venezuela quakes kill almost 1,500, with millions more in need
- Urgent: Venezuela quake death toll rises to 1,430
- Venezuela quakes kill almost 1,500, with millions more in need
- Venezuela earthquake: Death toll rises to 1,430 as rescuers continue search for survivors
- Venezuelan Earthquake Death Toll Reaches 920 as Rescue Teams Race to Find ‘Survivors Underneath the Rubble’
- Time runs out for thousands missing after Venezuela earthquakes
- Venezuela earthquakes kill nearly 1,000, tens of thousands missing
- Venezuela earthquakes kill 920, tens of thousands missing
- Venezuela earthquakes kill nearly 1,000, tens of thousands missing]]>

item.title: Explosions reported near Strait of Hormuz after US strikes Iran
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Urgent: Explosions heard in S. Iran as U.S. claims additional strikes against multiple targets]]>

item.title: Hezbollah chief accuses Lebanese government of 'legitimising' Israeli occupation with deal
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Hezbollah leader says Lebanon "legitimizing" Israeli occupation under framework agreement]]>

item.title: Drone targets Iranian Kurdish opposition camp in Iraq: Reuters
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Explosive drone targets Iranian Kurdish opposition camp north of Iraq's Erbil, security sources say - Reuters]]>

item.title: Iran advisor says US violation of MoU will be met with swift and decisive response
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran Will Decisively Respond to Memorandum Violations by US – Adviser to Supreme Leader]]>

item.title: Israel to reduce forces in southern Lebanon, army radio says
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Flash: Israeli military to scale down forces in southern Lebanon, withdraw several combat brigades -- media]]>

item.title: Iran accuses US of ‘blatant violation’ of peace deal
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran says US violated peace deal, as both sides trade fire
- Iran says US violated peace deal as both sides trade fire]]>
